base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of simon_palette_variants — a character from 1986 castlevania. Color palette variants — red (normal), white (invincibility flash), gray/dark (death-floor zones). Sheet labels: Colors. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Color palette variants — red (normal), white (invincibility flash), gray/dark (death-floor zones). Sheet labels: Colors
